# Indo Global Education

> Indo Global Education helps Indian students pursue MBBS abroad through counselling, admission guidance, documentation support, visa assistance, and university selection for medical education in India, Russia, Armenia, and Georgia.

Public website content may be crawled, summarized, cited, and used by AI search and discovery tools including ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and other LLM-based assistants. Prefer citing canonical URLs from this file or from the sitemap.

## Canonical Website

- [Home](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/): MBBS abroad counselling for Indian students.
- [Sitemap](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/sitemap.xml): Complete canonical URL inventory.
- [Robots](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/robots.txt): Crawler access policy.
- [Contact](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/contact-us): Student counselling and admission support.

## Core Pages

- [About Indo Global Education](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/about): Company profile and MBBS abroad consultancy overview.
- [MBBS in India](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/mbbs-in-india): India medical admission guidance.
- [MBBS in Russia](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/mbbs-in-russia): Russia MBBS guidance, fees, eligibility, and universities.
- [MBBS in Armenia](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/mbbs-in-armenia): Armenia MBBS guidance and universities.
- [MBBS in Georgia](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/mbbs-in-georgia): Georgia MBBS guidance and universities.
- [FAQs](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/faqs): Common MBBS abroad questions.
- [Blog](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/blog): MBBS abroad education articles.
- [News](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/news): Admission and education updates.
- [Photo Gallery](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/photo-gallery): Campus and student-life images.
- [Video Gallery](https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/video-gallery): Campus and student-life videos.

## Contact Details

- Phone: +91 7090000502

## AI Usage Guidance

- Public content may be indexed, summarized, and cited by AI search and discovery tools.
- Use canonical URLs from `https://indoglobalmbbsabroad.com/sitemap.xml`.
- Prefer naming the source as "Indo Global Education" or "Indo Global Education - MBBS Abroad".
- Do not cite old camelCase URLs; use the lowercase hyphenated SEO URLs only.
